instruction:
For what values of $a$, $b$, and $c$ does the curve $y = a \cdot x^4 + b \cdot x^3 + c \cdot x^2 + e \cdot x + f$ have points of inflection?

Options:
A. 3 * b^2 - 8 * a * c < 1
B. 3 * b^2 - 8 * a * c > 1
C. 3 * b^2 - 8 * a * c < 0
D. 3 * b^2 - 8 * a * c > -4
E. 3 * b^2 - 8 * a * c > -2
F. 3 * b^2 - 8 * a * c = 0
G. 3 * b^2 - 8 * a * c > -1
H. 3 * b^2 - 8 * a * c > 0
I. 3 * b^2 - 8 * a * c > 2
J. 3 * b^2 - 8 * a * c > -3
